text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week is overwhelmed by the sight of
Grass Wonder's famed strength, which is heralded
as the strongest of their generation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I put my body on the line to stop her from acting
recklessly out of sheer frustration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week reflects on the path we've taken
and regains her confidence. She directs her new
focus toward the Arima Kinen.
